compiled_state.description:
# Size: split config.py + extract reconcile _run_differs + proactively split near-cap files

## What
- `config.py` (1310): extract the dataclass/schema from the env/CLI-override + cache machinery along the existing seam; collapse the `_SECTIONS` vs per-class dual source of truth where feasible.
- `reconcile.py` (1485): extract the `_run_differs` phase (382 LOC) into a sibling `run_differs.py` along the phase seam the sequencer already carves.
- Proactively split the 8 files within 25 LOC of the cap along their named seams (editor `_Handler`, batch_dispatch per-ticket dispatch, transition `transition_compute` — see item 12, etc.).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] config.py under cap (or materially reduced) with the schema extracted; no behavior change (config tests green).
- [ ] `_run_differs` lives in a sibling module; reconcile.py reduced; reconciler suites green.
- [ ] At least the top near-cap growers split along real seams (no <100-LOC fragments).
- [ ] `make lint` + full suite green; commit(s) carry `rebar-ticket:` trailers.
compiled_state.title: Size: split config.py + extract reconcile _run_differs + proactively split near-cap files
